Brand.name: Dental Map
Brand.tagline: Egypt's booking engine for dentists — live availability, verified reviews.

Home.heroSubtitle: Search 50+ verified dentists across Cairo. See real open slots. Book instantly — the slot you pick lands in the clinic's own calendar.
Home.specialtiesSubtitle: Browse by what your teeth actually need.
Home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three steps. No calls. No confusion.
Home.howStep1Body: Filter by specialty, area, fee, insurance, or specific dentist.
Home.howStep2Body: Every slot is computed live from the dentist's own calendar.
Home.howStep3Body: Booking lands in the clinic's schedule. You get email + SMS reminders.
Home.forClinicsBody: Get Dental Map-quality patients. We plug into the Dentolize calendar you already use — no double entry.
Home.footerTagline: The dentist booking engine, wired to the clinic.

Dashboard.gcalExplainBody: Dental Map reads your Google Calendar free/busy to compute open slots, and writes new bookings back into it. Dentolize users: point Dentolize at the same Google Calendar and the loop becomes automatic.
Dashboard.workingHoursSubtitle: Set the hours you see patients. Slots are generated inside these windows.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_connected: Your Google Calendar is connected. Dental Map will read free/busy and write confirmed bookings here.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_denied: You denied access. You can try again — we only request calendar scopes, nothing else.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_bad_state: Something went wrong with the handshake. Please try again.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_state_mismatch: Session mismatch. Please sign in and try again.
Dashboard.gcalStatus_no_refresh: Google didn't return a refresh token. Click Connect again and choose Allow.
Dashboard.bookingsEmpty: No bookings yet — patient-side search ships next week.
Dashboard.bookingsEmptyHint: When patients book, they'll appear here with phone, time, and quick actions.
Dashboard.clinicPlaceholder: Full clinic profile editor ships next. For now we're onboarding pilot clinics manually.
Dashboard.modePickerTitle: How do you want to manage availability?
Dashboard.modePickerSubtitle: You can change this any time. Most clinics start with Google Calendar.
Dashboard.modeGoogleBody: Best fit. Connect a Google Calendar — Dental Map reads free/busy and writes new bookings into it. If you use Dentolize or Dentalore, configure them to sync with this same Google Calendar and you're done.
Dashboard.modeManualBody: No calendar connection. Slots come purely from your working hours below. Best if you don't use any calendar software, or you'd rather copy bookings into Dentolize manually (we'll show one-click copy buttons in the bookings inbox).
Dashboard.modeBusyExplain: Slots = working hours below − anything blocking on your calendar.
Dashboard.modeManualExplain: Slots = working hours below − bookings on Dental Map.
Dashboard.publishBody: When ready, flip this on so patients can find and book your dentists.

Auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your details to access your bookings.
Auth.signUpSubtitle: It takes a minute. You'll need it to book.
Auth.phoneHint: Used by the clinic to reach you — required.
